title: The Doctor and the Pencil
description: Jurgen Haarbermaaster’s 1972 avant-garde film. An exploration of pain and rage, but also playful and comedic. So playful.
altHero: black and white shot of a mad doctor
alt1: creepy man dressed as a pencil
alt2: the doctor looks upset as a light bulb swings back and forth
alt4: a hand holds a telephone receiver up to a flattened piece of organ meat
